Quickly view and sell your Solana token holdings while browsing trading platforms. Auto-detects tokens on popular DEX sites.

X-Trader Quick Sell is a floating widget that lets you view your Solana
token positions and sell them instantly while browsing any supported
Solana trading site.

KEY FEATURES
• Real-time position tracking via secure WebSocket connection
• One-click quick sell at preset percentages (1%, 5%, 10%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)
• Floating widget available on every supported DEX site
• Automatically highlights the token on the page you are viewing
• Sound alert when a new position opens
• Draggable, resizable glass UI that stays out of your way

HOW IT WORKS
1. Log in via Telegram one-time code (no password required)
2. The widget connects securely to your X-Trader account
3. Your positions appear in a floating panel as you browse
4. Click a percentage to sell — the transaction is executed by your
   X-Trader backend on Solana

REQUIREMENTS
• An active X-Trader account (sign up at x-trader.ai)
• A Telegram account to complete one-time login

PRIVACY
• No browsing data is collected
• No analytics or tracking
• Authentication tokens stored locally in chrome.storage.local
• Full privacy policy: https://x-trader.ai/privacy-extension

The extension only activates on trading sites you visit yourself, and
all trading actions require your explicit click.

History of recommendations from YouTube homepage

Have you ever refreshed YouTube’s homepage and instantly regretted it — realizing the recommendations you wanted to check out were gone? This simple extension automatically saves snapshots of your recent YouTube homepage recommendations, so you can easily find interesting videos that disappeared after a refresh.

🔔 Key Features
✅ Automatically saves the first 12 recommended videos from your YouTube homepage whenever you visit or refresh.
✅ Keeps up to the last 5 snapshots — a total of up to 60 saved videos.
✅ All data is stored locally on your device — no data ever leaves your browser.
✅ One-click access to your saved recommendations via the extension popup.
✅ Clear your saved history anytime with a simple button.
✅ Works quietly in the background — no configuration needed.

🔐 Privacy First
Your saved recommendations are only stored locally on your device. This extension does not collect any personal data and does not send anything to external servers.

🌟 Why Use It?
- You found some cool videos on YouTube’s homepage, but you refreshed the page.
- You accidentally closed YouTube and lost your recommendations.
- You like to browse casually and save interesting videos for later without manually adding them to "Watch Later."
- You want a lightweight tool to keep track of YouTube’s changing recommendations — all without leaving YouTube or using any external app.

💬 Feedback Welcome!
I created this extension because I personally kept losing interesting videos after refreshing YouTube. If you have suggestions, feedback, or ideas for improvements, I’d love to hear from you! You can submit feedback via the extension’s Feedback section.
Block unwanted popup windows and redirect ads. Blacklist domains that keep opening new windows.

BlockURL automatically blocks popup windows and redirect ads from domains you choose to blacklist.

HOW IT WORKS:
• Add any annoying domain to your blacklist
• BlockURL monitors all new tabs and windows
• Matching popups are instantly closed before you even see them
• Works across every website you visit

FEATURES:
• Domain Blacklisting - Add domains that keep opening unwanted popups
• Auto-Close - If a popup slips through, BlockURL detects and closes it within milliseconds
• Subdomain Matching - Blocking "example.com" also blocks "ads.example.com"
• Block Counter - See how many popups have been blocked today and in total
• Cloud Sync - Your blacklist syncs across all your Chrome browsers
• Privacy First - We never track your browsing history

FREE PLAN:
• 20 blocks per day
• Unlimited blacklist domains
• Auto-close popups

PRO PLAN ($2.99/mo or $19.99/yr):
• Unlimited blocks
• Priority support

Simply click the BlockURL icon, and the current site's domain is auto-filled — one click to block it forever.
Take screenshots on YouTube and interact with ChatGPT or generate images without leaving your favorite website.

Explore Learning with 'Image Narrator': Your AI-Powered Educational Assistant

Purpose of the System
Embark on a learning adventure with Image Narrator, designed to help visually impaired learners easily access educational videos. By converting video images into accessible formats, Image Narrator removes barriers, making learning more accessible. Our real-time Q&A feature instantly clarifies your doubts, enhancing your educational experience.

Scope of Functionality

1. Browser Extension: Seamless Learning on Chrome
   - Download from the Chrome Web Store and activate features directly in your browser while watching videos. Here’s what makes Image Narrator special:
     - Image and Text Recognition: Converts educational content from videos into accessible formats, making information easy to understand.
     - Screen Reader Friendly: Converts all text to accessible formats, simplifying navigation and learning.
     - AI-Assisted Q&A: Get immediate answers to your questions directly within the video learning environment.

2. System Website: Organize and Review Your Learning
   - Our user-friendly website allows you to manage and revisit educational materials and keep track of your learning progress with ease.
     - Accessible Interface: Easy navigation and access to all features, ensuring a barrier-free learning journey.
     - Learning Records: Detailed tracking of your educational activities to help reinforce and expand your knowledge.

Looking Ahead
   - Advanced Tools: To provide deeper insights into your learning materials.

### Feature
- Producthunt.com Dark Mode is ready to use
- Add "Dark Mode" toggle button (left bottom corner)

Changelog:
v3.1.9
- update stylesheet
A Chrome extension that remove locale/language from the URL to navigate to the same page in the default language.

Features

- Automatically navigate to the your default language version of the site by removing a language/locale part from the URL of the supported websites page when moved from other domains.  
  And display a toast message with a link to the original locale page.
- Context menus on supported websites to ...
  1. Navigate to the default language version
  2. Copy a URL without locale/language
  3. Add exclusion path pattern
  4. Remove exclusion path pattern
  5. Clear all exclusion path patterns

Supported Websites and URL formats

- Microsoft Learn  
  i.e. `https://learn.microsoft.com/<LOCALE>/...`
- AWS Documentation  
  i.e. `https://docs.aws.amazon.com/<LOCALE>/...`
- Google Cloud  
  i.e. `https://cloud.googlecom/...?...&hr=<LANGUAGE>&...`
- GitHub Documentation  
  i.e. `https://docs.github.com/<LANGUAGE>/...`

Change logs
0.0.4
- Improve Feature(s)
  - Keep a toast showing until clicking
  - Improve stability

0.0.3
- Add Feature(s)
  - Add exclution path pattern

0.0.2
- Bug fix
  - Cannot redirect when opening on new tab/window

0.0.1
- The First release

Filter search results for your favorite websites on Google, Bing, and DuckDuckGo

This extension helps you prioritise Google, Bing, and DuckDuckGo search results from your favourite websites. Here's how to use it:

- Add websites you want to prioritise in the input field above and click "Add Website" or press Enter.
- You can add multiple websites. Each website can be a domain name (e.g., "example.com") or a specific page (e.g., "example.com/page").
- To remove a website, click the "Remove" button next to it in the list above.
- When you perform a Google, Bing or DuckDuckGo search, the extension will automatically open to show prioritised results from your saved websites.

Note: The extension only works on Google, Bing, and DuckDuckGo search result pages. It does not affect your search results on other websites.

This extension is to extend the functionality of AdunaData website to fill forms and fetch company data.

AdunaData Extension is a productiveness Chrome Extension that automates filling forms on the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) portal and the AdunaData platform. It enables auto-filling company information and filing forms with pre-stored data.

✔ Autofill company registration, address, director information, and more
✔ Nothing is sent to any external servers
✔ Simple click for seamless integration into your current workflow

Designed to save time, minimize mistakes, and save time for professionals that work with MCA forms and AdunaData dashboards.

FX智能网页图片翻译器 FX Smart Web Image Translator(全功能的AI网页内容翻译工具)
智能网页图片翻译器，支持网页全文翻译、网页图片翻译、网页图片内容描述、YouTube视频字幕翻译，x.com(Twitter)AI视频字幕翻译

网页全文翻译、网页图片文字翻译、图片内容识别、YouTube视频字幕翻译、x.com（Twitter）视频AI字幕翻译🎙️

打破语言壁垒，享受纯净阅读。

FX智能翻译是一款专为深度内容阅读者设计的 Chrome 扩展。它不只是简单的文字转换，更是依托于先进大语言模型（LLM）的智能阅读助手。无论是精密的学术论文、生动的社交媒体动态，还是嵌入在图片中的关键信息，FX 都能为您一键化解语言障碍。

🌟 核心功能
🖼️ 革命性的图片翻译 不再需要手动输入图片中的文字！FX 能自动识别网页中的海报、图表、社交媒体配图。
🫧 沉浸式文本渲染 采用自研的“流光渲染”引擎。翻译过程伴随优雅的流光动画，结果自然融入网页排版。支持“直接替换”与“对照阅读”两种模式，满足不同阅读习惯。
📱 深度适配社交媒体 针对 Twitter (X)、YouTube 评论区、Bilibili 评论区等动态加载页面进行了针对性优化。

💡 为什么选择 FX？
更懂语义的 AI：告别生硬的机器翻译，FX 采用先进模型，能够根据上下文精准还原推特流行语、技术术语和复杂长句。

隐私保护：我们仅传输加密后的待翻译文本，不收集、不存储您的任何个人隐私数据，您的浏览记录始终属于您。
🛠️ 简单操作
快捷键一键触发：按下 Alt + R 即可瞬间切换翻译状态。
简洁控制面板：随时在弹窗中切换目标语言与翻译模式。
立即下载 FX智能翻译，开启您的全球化无碍阅读时代。
どこでも付箋 - Sticky Notes Everywhere
Webページ上にどこでも付箋を貼れる拡張機能

「どこでも付箋」は、あらゆるWebページに直接付箋を貼り付けられるChrome拡張機能です。
調べ物のメモ、重要情報の記録、タスク管理など、ブラウジング中の思考を即座に可視化できます。

■ 主な機能
✓ ドラッグ&ドロップで簡単作成 - カラースワッチをドラッグするだけで付箋を配置
✓ 10色のカラーバリエーション - 用途別に色分けして整理
✓ 自由な配置とサイズ調整 - ドラッグ移動、リサイズ対応
✓ 付箋セット機能 - 複数の付箋をまとめて保存・読み込み
✓ キーボードショートカット - Alt+1～0で瞬時に色別付箋を作成（macOSはCtrl+1～0）
✓ 一括操作 - すべての付箋を表示/非表示、メモ内容コピー、削除
✓ ドメインブラックリスト - 特定サイトでの機能無効化に対応
✓ カスタマイズ可能 - 色プリセット、サイズ、UIレイアウトを自由に設定

■ プライバシーとセキュリティ
・すべてのデータはブラウザのローカルストレージに保存
・外部サーバーへのデータ送信は一切なし
・個人情報の収集なし
・最小限の権限のみを使用

■ 使い方
1. 拡張機能をインストール
2. メニューバーから好きな色をドラッグしてページに配置
3. テキストを入力（自動保存）
4. ドラッグで移動、端をドラッグでリサイズ

キーボードショートカットでさらに高速：
・Windows/Linux: Alt + 1～0で色別付箋を作成
・macOS: Ctrl + 1～0で色別付箋を作成
・Alt/Ctrl + H で全付箋の表示切替
・ショートカットキーの変更、オンオフも可能

■ 注意事項
・SPAなど一部のページでは、付箋の維持をオフにしていても付箋が残り続けることがあります
・一部のサイトでは正しく動作しないことがあります

■ バージョン履歴
v1.1.0 - macOSサポート、キーボードショートカット編集機能を追加
v1.0.0 - 初回リリース
Outr — Find Out Corporations’ True Colors
Outr is a Google Chrome extension for users to more readily understand corporations’ political donations to anti-LGBTQIA+ campaigns.

Outr works by combing through the tab currently in use to find the names of companies. If statistics exist on any corporation’s anti-LGBTQIA+ political campaign contributions, Outr will automatically display both on the Home page.

Outr supports case-insensitive querying. To scour statistics directly by the names of companies, check out the Search page.

Outr will systematically update its icon to reflect the number of matches discovered on a given tab. To see this in action, make sure to pin the extension.

Outr streamlines the process of posting to social media with pre-populated Tweets. To share your insights, press the Twitter icon next to a particular match.

Outr does not collect, share, or sell your data. All code runs locally. To learn more about Outr, head to the About page.

Quality Fusion App is a powerful Chrome Extension designed to help users seamlessly capture, analyze, and store UI elements from both web and mobile-responsive pages.

How many times have you got Rickrolled?

How many times have you got Rickrolled? 

Features:
- Displays an alert when the extension detects that you've been Rickrolled.
- View the total number of times you've been Rickrolled on the current browser in the extension popup.

Disclaimer:
A Rickroll is only detected when navigating to the original Rickroll video from a different link. A Rickroll will not be detected if:
- Rickroll tab is closed, then reopened again using Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + T.
- Link to the video is opened in a new window.
- Video is opened in Incognito.
- Refreshing the original Rickroll video.
Clone a repository with DevPod in one click! Adds DevPod buttons to Github repositories and pull requests.

Clone a repository with DevPod in one click! Adds DevPod buttons to Github and GitLab repositories and pull requests.

When you click the button, the extension will send you to https://devpod.sh/open with the current repository and branch name. Doesn't require any authentication or access to any accounts, no registration or logins or anything.

This requires DevPod to be installed to function properly.

This extension supports Enterprise V2021 and Community Edition and eases the auto-login configuration process, as well as record and playback of actions within the Chrome browser. Recording of web tasks in all popular technologies such as HTML, Java, and more are supported using object cloning technology. Detailed information related to the recorded actions is populated, enabling the user to automate tasks quickly in a seamless manner.
엘리스 강의와 구글시트를 한 화면에 보여주는 익스텐션

엘리스 강의와 구글시트를 한 화면에 보여주는 익스텐션입니다.

[주요기능]
1. 사이드시트 ON/OFF 기능
- 상단 익스텐션 버튼을 이용하여 사이트시트 기능을 켜고 끌 수 있습니다.

2.숨기기 기능
- 우하단 엑셀버튼을 클릭하여 사이드 시트를 숨기거나 다시 보이게 할 수 있습니다.

3.너비 설정 기능
- `넓게`, `일반`, `좁게` 버튼을 이용하여 너비를 설정할 수 있습니다.
- 커스텀 너비(%)를 설정할 수 있습니다

4. 소스 설정 기능
- `반 버튼`을 클릭하여 자신의 반에 해당하는 구글 스프레드 시트를 열 수 있습니다.
- 직접지정 버튼을 클릭하여 구글 스프레드시트의 URL을 입력하여 소스를 설정할 수 있습니다.

[버전 히스토리] 
- 1.0.2  로딩시 스위치 꺼져도 엑셀버튼 추가되는 오류 수정 (22.05.27)  
- 1.0.1  강의실이 아닌 일부 사이트에서 보이는 오류 수정
- 1.0.0  현재 최신 버전

It will autofix broken Goo.gl short links, create new with analytics and insights.

A one-click solution to fix and manage old goo.gl links. Automatically recover lost traffic, claim your backlinks, and get powerful analytics.

Key Features You'll Love:

Automatic Redirection: As an end-user, simply install the extension and forget about broken goo.gl links. It works in the background to seamlessly redirect you.

✅ Claim Your Backlinks:- Found a goo.gl link in your old blog post or video description? Our simple claiming process lets you take ownership of that link and its data.

✅ Effortless Migration:- In a content editor, the extension intelligently detects and replaces your old goo.gl links with new xgoo.gl links. Just save your work, and you're done!

✅ Create New Links:- Use our companion website to create new xgoo.gl shortlinks for your future content.

✅ Powerful Analytics Dashboard:- See real-time analytics on your claimed links, including clicks, sources, and more.

Join the thousands of users who are already giving new life to their digital content.

*Note: This is not affiliated to any company, brand or service, but an independent creative work to help community users recover their valuable links.
